title: MineWordle
description: Play Wordle inside Minecraft! Use /wordle command to open the game.
body:
# MineWordle

Play **Wordle** inside Minecraft — without ever leaving the game!

## Features

- **Daily Mode** (`/wordle`) — Fetches today's official NYT Wordle word and saves your progress
- **Practice Mode** (`/wordle practice`) — Unlimited random games, no saving
- **Full Wordle UI** — 6×5 tile grid, QWERTY on-screen keyboard, color-coded feedback
- **Share your results** — Copy emoji grid to clipboard or post to Minecraft chat
- **Sound effects** — Unique sounds for wins, losses, and key presses
- **Client-side only** — No server mod required

## How to Play

1. Type `/wordle` to open the daily puzzle (or `/wordle practice` for unlimited play)
2. Guess a 5-letter word in 6 attempts
3. 🟩 = correct position / 🟨 = wrong position / ⬛ = not in word
